finding: Provider-backed OpenAI text-embedding-3-small matches the best local retrievers (local TF-IDF vector and feature-hashed embedding store) at 100% retrieval hit rate@3 and 100% citation coverage on the 358-case synthetic golden benchmark. The hosted embedding adds no measurable lift here because the controlled benchmark is saturated; the harder public TechQA/WixQA tracks (local hit@3 80.73% / 77.50%) are the better discriminator for provider embeddings.
review_note: Single credentialed run, manually reviewed. OpenAI embeddings are deterministic per model and input, but this result is not regenerated by deterministic CI (no API key in CI); the raw per-case file stays local/gitignored. Regenerate with scripts/run_provider_embedding_eval.py --run and OPENAI_API_KEY.
